_comment: Main_8_symbolic_regression_SR.ipynb — PySR distillation of a trained NN teacher (Main_6 SimpleNN or Main_7 PINNPFR). See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.
_processed_stem_comment: Pins data/processed/features_targets_training_data_complete_<stem>.pkl (course default: the sample150 release dataset). Set to null for the newest features_targets_*.pkl.
_budget_comment: Course defaults sized for free Colab (PySR's Julia backend dominates the first-run cost). Research-scale values: n_distill_samples=5000, sr_n_iterations=100, sr_populations=30, sr_maxsize=25.
